pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage showing the main feed of latest book and movie reviews with quick actions and entry points into search, books, movies, and reading lists.
primary_functions: Display a mixed feed of the latest book and movie review posts
Allow sorting of the feed (e.g., 'Newest First', 'Most Popular')
Provide 'Mark as Read' and 'Save for Later' actions on each post card
Provide prominent access to site-wide search
Provide quick navigation to Books and Movies sections via header

incoming_params.description: Sort order for the home feed, e.g., 'newest', 'most_popular'. Used to support the 'Newest First' selection in Task 8.
Current page of the home feed for pagination.
Number of items per page in the home feed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Books' link in the main navigation header.
Click the 'Movies' link in the main navigation header.
Submit the global search form with a query such as 'Inception' or 'The Lord of the Rings'.
Click a review title or card in the home feed.
Click the 'Reading Lists' link in the header.
Click the 'Sign Up' link in the header from the homepage.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link in the main header navigation.
Directly accessible as the main landing page at index.html.

pages.name: Reviews Listing
pages.description: Listing page for browsing book or movie reviews with filters and sorting (used by Books and Movies sections).
primary_functions: Display a list of reviews filtered by content type (books, movies) and other parameters
Provide sidebar filters: Genre, Content Type, Date range (including 'Last 6 months'), Rating range, Runtime, Publication/Release Year
Provide sort options such as 'Rating: High to Low', 'Rating: Low to High', 'Most Popular', 'Release Year: Oldest First', 'Release Year: Newest First'
Allow clicking a review title or card to open the full review detail page
Support breadcrumb links like 'All Science Fiction Books' to return to filtered lists from detail pages

incoming_params.description: Specifies whether to show 'books' or 'movies' reviews. Set by header links and preserved in breadcrumbs and back-links.
Selected genre filter, e.g., 'Science Fiction', 'Mystery', 'Thriller', 'Comedy'. Used heavily in Tasks 1, 3, 4, and 7.
ID of a date range preset from getReviewFilterOptions (e.g., 'last_6_months'). Used in Task 1.
Minimum rating filter (e.g., 3, 4.5) for listing pages. Used in Tasks 3, 4, and 7.
Maximum rating filter (e.g., 2, 4) for listing pages. Used in Tasks 4 and 7.
Minimum book publication year filter (e.g., 2016) used in Task 3.
Minimum movie release year filter (e.g., 2021) used in Task 7.
Minimum runtime in minutes for movie filters (e.g., 120) used in Task 4.
Maximum runtime in minutes for movie filters if needed.
Sort option key, e.g., 'rating_desc', 'rating_asc', 'most_popular', 'release_year_asc'.
Pagination: current page index for the listing.
Pagination: number of reviews per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a review title or card within the listing.
Submit the global search form from the listing page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Books' (reviews.html?content_type=books) or 'Movies' (reviews.html?content_type=movies) header links.
Deep-linked with filters and sorting using query parameters.

pages.name: Review Detail
pages.description: Page for reading a single book or movie review in full, performing like and list actions, and interacting via comments.
primary_functions: Display full review content with metadata (overall star rating, genre, runtime, publication/release year, tags)
Provide actions to add the item to Favorites, other Reading Lists, or Watchlist (e.g., 'Add to Reading List', 'Add to Watchlist', 'Add to List')
Provide a 'Like' action (heart icon) for the review
Display and allow posting of comments, including entering text and clicking 'Post Comment'
Provide breadcrumb or back-link navigation to return to the previous listing or search results
Show the author name as a link to the Author Profile page

incoming_params.description: The reviewId of the book or movie review to display.
Optional context flag indicating where the user came from (e.g., 'home', 'listing', 'search', 'list') for labeling the back link.
Optional encoded URL used for 'Back to results' or breadcrumb links (e.g., back to a filtered listing or search results).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a breadcrumb such as 'All Science Fiction Books' when viewing a science fiction book review.
Click 'Back to results' when the detail view was opened from Search Results.
Click the author name shown below the review title.

access_methods.description: Accessed using review_detail.html?id={reviewId} from listings, search results, reading lists, or author pages.
Linked from review cards and lists throughout the site.

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Search results page for queries entered in the global search bar, with filters for content type, tags, genre, and rating.
primary_functions: Display search results for a given query string (e.g., 'Inception', 'The Lord of the Rings')
Provide filters such as Content Type (books, movies), Tags (e.g., 'lord_of_the_rings'), Genre, and Rating
Allow sorting of results (e.g., by relevance, date, rating)
Allow clicking a result title to open its Review Detail page
Maintain navigation back to search results from a review via a 'Back to results' link

incoming_params.description: Search query string entered by the user (e.g., 'Inception', 'The Lord of the Rings').
Optional filter restricting results to 'books' or 'movies', used in Tasks 2 and 5.
Optional genre filter applied on top of the query.
Comma-separated list of tag IDs used for tag filtering (e.g., the 'Lord of the Rings' tag in Task 5).
Optional minimum rating filter for search results.
Optional maximum rating filter for search results.
Sorting key for search results, e.g., 'relevance', 'date_desc', 'rating_desc'.
Current search results page for pagination.
Number of search results displayed per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the title of a search result review.

access_methods.description: Opened when the global search form is submitted from any page.
Deep-linkable with a query and optional filters via URL parameters.

pages.name: Reading Lists Overview
pages.description: Central hub for managing Favorites, Watchlist, Save for Later, and custom reading lists such as 'Summer 2026'.
primary_functions: Display all user lists, including defaults such as Favorites, Watchlist, and Save for Later, plus any custom lists
Provide a 'Create New List' action to create custom lists (e.g., 'Summer 2026') with a name field and create button
Allow opening a specific list to view its items via navigation to the List Detail page
Allow basic list management such as renaming or deleting custom lists

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific list (e.g., 'Favorites', 'Watchlist', or 'Summer 2026') in the overview.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Reading Lists' link in the main header navigation.
Can be visited directly at reading_lists.html.

pages.name: List Detail
pages.description: Page showing the contents of a single reading list or watchlist, with options to remove items and open their review pages.
primary_functions: Display all reviews saved to a specific list (e.g., Favorites, Watchlist, 'Summer 2026', 'Save for Later')
Allow removal of items from the list
Allow clicking an item to open its Review Detail page
Optionally allow simple reordering or filtering within the list (e.g., by rating or date added)

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the reading list to display (e.g., Favorites, Watchlist, or a custom list like 'Summer 2026').
Optional sort key for items within the list (e.g., 'date_added_desc', 'rating_desc').
Current page of list items for pagination.
Number of items per page within the list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an item title within the list to open its review.
Click a 'Back to all lists' link from a list detail view.

access_methods.description: Accessed using list_detail.html?listId={listId} from the Reading Lists Overview page.

pages.name: Author Profile
pages.description: Profile page for a reviewer, showing their bio, stats, and a list of their reviews, with the ability to follow them.
primary_functions: Display author information such as name, bio, and basic stats (e.g., number of reviews, average rating)
Show a list of reviews written by this author with links to individual Review Detail pages
Provide a 'Follow' button to follow or unfollow the author

incoming_params.description: Author ID of the reviewer whose profile is being viewed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the title of any review listed on the author's profile.

access_methods.description: Accessed via author.html?id={authorId} from a review detail page.

pages.name: Newsletter
pages.description: Page for subscribing to and configuring newsletter preferences, including custom frequencies and rating filters.
primary_functions: Collect subscriber name and email address
Allow selection of a main frequency option, including 'Custom per category'
Allow setting category-specific frequencies, such as 'Books: Weekly' and 'Movies: Monthly'
Provide an option to only receive reviews with ratings of 4 stars and above
Save the newsletter subscription and preferences via a 'Save Preferences' or 'Subscribe' button

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Newsletter' link in the site footer.
Can be visited directly at newsletter.html.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact form for sending feedback or questions to the site owner, including comments on specific reviews.
primary_functions: Provide a form with fields for name, email, and message
Allow users to reference specific reviews in the message (e.g., by pasting the exact review title)
Submit the completed form via a 'Send Message' button

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Contact' link in the site footer.
Can be visited directly at contact.html.

pages.name: Account & Preferences
pages.description: Single-user account setup and basic preferences page for creating and viewing the local profile.
primary_functions: Provide a simple form to enter username, email, and password labeled as 'Create Account'
Store basic profile data for the single user of the site
Optionally expose basic personal settings (e.g., default newsletter opt-in, default list preferences)

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Sign Up' link in the main header navigation.
Can be visited directly at account.html.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information page about the blog and its creator, explaining focus, background, and how to follow or get in touch.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose and background of the personal blog
Introduce the blogger/reviewer and their focus on book and movie reviews
Provide links or guidance for contacting the creator or following on external platforms

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact me' link within the About content.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'About' link in the site footer.
Can be visited directly at about.html.

header_links.description: Homepage with latest reviews and quick actions
Listing of book reviews with filters and sorting
Listing of movie reviews with filters and sorting
Overview of Favorites, Watchlist, Save for Later, and custom lists
Single-user account setup and basic preferences

footer_links.description: Information about the blog and its creator
Contact form for feedback or questions
Subscribe to and manage newsletter preferences
